channel.title: kelseycookcomedy
channel.description: MARK YOUR TERRITORY out now on Hulu & YouTube! Come see me on tour! Tix👇🏻🎫

item.title: 🚨 NEW TOUR!! 🚨 The Reasonable Bedtime Tour kicks off in Ja...
item.description:
🚨 NEW TOUR!! 🚨 The Reasonable Bedtime Tour kicks off in January and more cities will be added for the second half of the year. Tickets on sale now! So excited to see you guys on the road and we’ll wrap the shows up in time for you to not get screamed at by your sleep tracking device 😴
#tour #standupcomedy #tickets #comedy #bedtime
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
